top_signals.title: Hungary lifts 17-month veto on Ukraine’s EU membership bid
top_signals.summary: Also in this newsletter: Talking tough and acting soft on migration
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.

top_signals.title: Electronics retailers Yamada and Edion eye business integration
top_signals.summary: Through the integration, the two Japanese retailers aim to strengthen their capabilities in procurement and the development of original brand products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
